name: Global Transport
short_description: Global Transport is a fun and engaging game that will test your problem-solving and time-management skill
detailed_description:
Development has stopped 

Get ready to embark on the ultimate transportation adventure! In Global Transport, your goal is to navigate an intricate network of taxis, trains, and airplanes to reach your destination as quickly as possible. With each level, the challenge increases as roads, tracks, and air routes twist and turn, making it tricky to figure out the fastest way to travel. Can you master the maze of transportation and become the ultimate Global Transport king?
